description:
Evaluate network resilience to a traffic signal power outage in the Pasubio scenario. Generate a modified network from /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/pasubio_buslanes.net.xml by discarding all traffic lights and save it to /home/ga/SUMO_Output/pasubio_outage.net.xml. Run a baseline simulation using the original network and an outage simulation using the modified network (ensuring pasubio_tls.add.xml is not included in the outage configuration). Save the simulation configurations to /home/ga/SUMO_Output/run_baseline.sumocfg and /home/ga/SUMO_Output/run_outage.sumocfg. For both scenarios, determine the average waiting time and the total number of teleports. Save the results to /home/ga/SUMO_Output/resilience_report.txt using the following format:

Baseline Average Waiting Time: [value]
Baseline Teleports: [value]
Outage Average Waiting Time: [value]
Outage Teleports: [value]
